name: Gelato Di Mirtille
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar and egg yolks together until pale yellow and very thick.
2. Slowly add the milk, beating gently to avoid a buildup of foam. Add the lemon peel and stir in the salt.
3. Transfer the mixture to the top of a double boiler with an inch of boiling water in the bottom half. Regulate the heat so the water remains at a low boil, and stir continuously for 8 minutes. The custard will thicken to coat the spoon, and the surface foam will disappear.
4. Remove the top of the double boiler and set it in a large bowl of cold water. Stir for 2 minutes to cool the custard slightly.
5. Transfer the custard to a bowl, cover, and chill thoroughly. Also chill the pureed blueberries and heavy cream.
6. When ready to proceed, whip the cream until soft peaks form.
7. Remove the lemon peel from the custard and fold in the blueberries and whipped cream.
8. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream machine and freeze according to the machine's directions.
Makes 1 Quart
TOM MARESCA AND DIANE DARROW - PRODIGY GUEST CHEFS COOKBOOK
